testcase.name: LaunchBrowser

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: By.xpath: //*[text()='Add New']//following::flt-semantics[@role='button' and @tabindex='0' and contains(@style, 'transform: matrix(1, 0, 0, 1, 50, 7.5)')] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
